languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn listens and raises his eyebrows.{/n} "That cannot be right — that often? Yes, Nuncius, I would be obliged if you would assist in monitoring my vocabulary. But watch that superior tone of yours, please."

languages.text: {n}Эоганн, прислушавшись, поднимает брови:{/n} "Не может быть — так часто? Да, Нунциус, я буду признателен, если ты поможешь следить за моим лексиконом. Лишь держи свой снисходительный тон в узде".

{n}Eogunn listens and raises his eyebrows.{/n} "That cannot be right — that often? Yes, Nuncius, I would be obliged if you would assist in monitoring my vocabulary. But watch that superior tone of yours, please."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн, прислушавшись, поднимает брови:{/n} "Не может быть — так часто? Да, Нунциус, я буду признателен, если ты поможешь следить за моим лексиконом. Лишь держи свой снисходительный тон в узде".

{n}Eogunn listens and raises his eyebrows.{/n} "That cannot be right — that often? Yes, Nuncius, I would be obliged if you would assist in monitoring my vocabulary. But watch that superior tone of yours, please."

{n}Eogunn listens and raises his eyebrows.{/n} "That cannot be right — that often? Yes, Nuncius, I would be obliged if you would assist in monitoring my vocabulary. But watch that superior tone of yours, please."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn te escucha y arquea las cejas.{/n} «Eso no puede ser. ¿Tantas veces? Sí, Nuncius, agradecería que me asistiera en la monitorización de mi vocabulario. Pero ahórrese ese tonito de superioridad, haga el favor».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn listens and raises his eyebrows.{/n} "That cannot be right — that often? Yes, Nuncius, I would be obliged if you would assist in monitoring my vocabulary. But watch that superior tone of yours, please."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn te escucha y arquea las cejas.{/n} «Eso no puede ser. ¿Tantas veces? Sí, Nuncius, agradecería que me asistiera en la monitorización de mi vocabulario. Pero ahórrese ese tonito de superioridad, haga el favor».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡听完，挑了挑眉。{/n}“不可能吧，有那么频繁？好吧，努恩修斯，那就麻烦你帮我留意一下我的用词。不过请收敛一下你那高高在上的语气。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn listens and raises his eyebrows.{/n} "That cannot be right — that often? Yes, Nuncius, I would be obliged if you would assist in monitoring my vocabulary. But watch that superior tone of yours, please."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡听完，挑了挑眉。{/n}“不可能吧，有那么频繁？好吧，努恩修斯，那就麻烦你帮我留意一下我的用词。不过请收敛一下你那高高在上的语气。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn écoute et hausse les sourcils.{/n} « Non, c'est impossible... Tant que ça ? Oui, Nuncius, je te saurais gré de bien vouloir m'aider à mieux contrôler mon vocabulaire. Mais surveille le ton que tu prends avec moi, je te prie. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn listens and raises his eyebrows.{/n} "That cannot be right — that often? Yes, Nuncius, I would be obliged if you would assist in monitoring my vocabulary. But watch that superior tone of yours, please."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn écoute et hausse les sourcils.{/n} « Non, c'est impossible... Tant que ça ? Oui, Nuncius, je te saurais gré de bien vouloir m'aider à mieux contrôler mon vocabulaire. Mais surveille le ton que tu prends avec moi, je te prie. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn hört zu und hebt seine Brauen.{/n} "Das kann nicht stimmen — so oft? Ja, Nuncius, ich wäre Euch sehr dankbar, wenn Ihr mein Vokabular überwachen könntet. Aber spart Euch bitte Euren überheblichen Ton."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn listens and raises his eyebrows.{/n} "That cannot be right — that often? Yes, Nuncius, I would be obliged if you would assist in monitoring my vocabulary. But watch that superior tone of yours, please."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn hört zu und hebt seine Brauen.{/n} "Das kann nicht stimmen — so oft? Ja, Nuncius, ich wäre Euch sehr dankbar, wenn Ihr mein Vokabular überwachen könntet. Aber spart Euch bitte Euren überheblichen Ton."

languages.text: {n}エオグンはそれを聞いて眉をひそめた。{/n}「そんなに頻繁に？そうですね、ヌンシウス、私の語彙の監視を手伝っていただけると助かります。でも、その上から目線の口調には気をつけてくださいよ」。
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn listens and raises his eyebrows.{/n} "That cannot be right — that often? Yes, Nuncius, I would be obliged if you would assist in monitoring my vocabulary. But watch that superior tone of yours, please."

languages.text: {n}Nuncius'u dinleyen Eogunn, kaşlarını kaldırıyor.{/n} "Bu doğru olamaz. O kadar sık mı? Olur Nuncius, kelime dağarcığımı izlememe yardımcı olursan minnettar olurum. Fakat lütfen o üstünlük taslayan ses tonuna dikkat et."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn listens and raises his eyebrows.{/n} "That cannot be right — that often? Yes, Nuncius, I would be obliged if you would assist in monitoring my vocabulary. But watch that superior tone of yours, please."

traits.locale_text: {n}Nuncius'u dinleyen Eogunn, kaşlarını kaldırıyor.{/n} "Bu doğru olamaz. O kadar sık mı? Olur Nuncius, kelime dağarcığımı izlememe yardımcı olursan minnettar olurum. Fakat lütfen o üstünlük taslayan ses tonuna dikkat et."
